content.query:
SELECT          MM.ITNO AS  [Item Number]
,               ITDS AS     [Item Description]
,               ITCL AS     [Brand]
,               PRGP AS     [Product Group]
,               CS1.TX40 AS [Product Group Description]
,               ITTY AS     [Item Type]
,               CS2.TX40 AS [Item Type Description]
,               ITGR AS     [Item Category]
,               CS3.TX40 AS [Item Category Description]
,               BUAR AS     [Business Area]
,               MF.CSNO AS  [HTS Code]
,               MM.CFI4 AS  [Trump Tariff]
FROM            M3.MITMAS MM
JOIN            M3.MITFAC MF on MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS1 ON CS1.STCO = 'PRGP' AND CS1.STKY = MM.PRGP
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON CS2.STCO = 'ITTY' AND CS2.STKY = MM.ITTY
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS3 ON CS3.STCO = 'ITGR' AND CS3.STKY = MM.ITGR
